Tunan Pan
My Work About Me Say Hello

Hi, I'm Tunan! I'm a visual-turned-UX designer with a background in social impact. formerly an art director at a social change agency

That means I care about making things that are enjoyable and beautiful, but also functional and accessible — because good design should work for everyone.

Seattle Animal Shelter

Helping animal lovers complete their donations

Redesigned the donation flow to simplify the giving process, increase trust, and help users complete donations with greater confidence.

View case study →

Games For Change

Connecting users with social impact games

Improved information architecture and navigation to help users discover social impact games more easily across a growing content library.

View case study →

Library Extension

Finding and borrowing library books faster

Simplified the borrowing experience by reducing clutter, improving scanability, and streamlining key user actions.

View case study →

Board Game Arena

Making online board games more accessible

Created practical accessibility patterns and interface recommendations to improve usability for players with different access needs.

View project →

Every Vote In

Increasing voter turnout in the 2020 elections

Integrated civic campaign · record-breaking 76% turnout (+8pts)

Carton Council

Making carton recycling easier to understand and adopt

Behavior change · brand + social strategy

Battle Creek Public Schools

Rebuilding trust in a public school system

Multi-year communications system · increasing enrollment

Together Toward Health

Communicating public health impact during COVID-19

Digital storytelling · reports, video, newsletters

Optimizely

Designing low-cost, engaging employee experiences

Internal events · print + environmental design

CARE Court

Introducing HTML5 ads to improve campaign performance

Creative direction · first implementation at agency

Johnson & Johnson Global Public Health

Turning public health audiences into active participants

AR concepts · audience engagement

Hope for Haiti

Helping conference attendees engage with a VR story

AWE 2023 · booth experience design

San Diego Humane Society

Bringing an animal welfare campaign to life

Photoshoot art direction + production

Cravings Interpreter

AI-assisted web prototype

Custom Visual Timer

Figma → AI-assisted dev

Spring Fling: AR Filters

Spark AR Studio

A bit about me

🌱 Some things I'm currently working on:

  • experimenting with p5.js
  • this website!
  • designing a sensory overload management app
  • levelling up on Beat Saber

I’m a multidisciplinary designer transitioning into UX/UI after over a decade working in graphic design and art direction for mission-driven organizations.

From the earliest days of coding websites for my Neopets, to my later explorations of game dev and AR/XR, I’ve always been drawn to interactive experiences and the way design shapes how people think, feel, and connect.

For me, design has always been about helping people and making the world a better place. As an Asian New Zealander, queer, and neurodivergent woman, I’m always thinking about how differently people experience the world. I notice the details, am always questioning "why?", and care deeply about making designs that truly include everyone.

Open to full time and freelance work 📍 Seattle, Washington, USA

Say hello

Thanks for stopping by! Got a project you want to collaborate on, or just want to talk about design, dogs, or life?

© Tunan Pan 2026. Coded from scratch with love (and some frustration), so if you run into any bugs or accessibility issues, please do let me know! You can also directly submit issues on Github.
